varieties.name: Edamame (Generic Australian)
varieties.traits: Bush-type, 80-100cm height, white flowers, fuzzy green pods
varieties.availability: Mr Fothergill's, The Seed Collection, Southern Harvest, Seeds N Beyond

varieties.name: Cressy Edamame
varieties.traits: Mid-season, compact 45cm bush, purple flowers, pods along stem

varieties.name: Soybean 'Edamame' (Southern Harvest)
varieties.origin: Early-maturing selection, adapted for Australian conditions
varieties.traits: High quality, early maturity (1 week earlier than standard)
varieties.yield_notes: High yielding, versatile use (green edamame, dried, soy milk, tofu)

varieties.name: Midori Giant
varieties.traits: Large vigorous plants 5'+ (150cm+), white flowers

varieties.name: Envy
varieties.traits: Compact bush variety, 60-80cm, early flowering 29-34 days
varieties.yield_notes: Moderate yields, compact for small gardens

varieties.name: Butterbean
varieties.traits: Small-medium bush plants 60-80cm, compact habit

varieties.name: Beer Friend
varieties.traits: Medium bush plants, good branch structure

varieties.name: Chiba Green
varieties.traits: Compact upright plants, dark green foliage, early variety
varieties.yield_notes: Excellent flavor, 5-7 days earlier than Midori Giant

varieties.name: Shirofumi
varieties.traits: Early-maturing heirloom, bush variety, robust plants
varieties.yield_notes: High yields, sweet nutty flavor, smooth texture
varieties.availability: MIgardener, Thresh Seed Co., heirloom suppliers

varieties.name: Tankuro (Tankura)
varieties.traits: Vigorous growth, warm-loving, requires full sun 8+ hours
varieties.yield_notes: Excellent dual-purpose (fresh edamame or mature black beans)

varieties.name: BeSweet 2020
varieties.traits: Early flowering 29-34 days, compact bush form
varieties.yield_notes: Good yields on clay loam and clay soils

varieties.name: Moon Cake (Mooncake)
varieties.traits: Massive plants 5-6' (150-180cm) tall, vigorous

varieties.name: Garden Soy 01
varieties.traits: Selected for high yield, good branching

varieties.name: Garden Soy 21
varieties.traits: Improved variety for yield and quality
varieties.yield_notes: Top performer, performs better on clay soil

varieties.name: Mojo Green
varieties.traits: Selected for productivity and heat tolerance

varieties.name: Grand Forks
varieties.origin: Grand Forks, BC, Canada - Doukhobor heirloom
varieties.traits: Rare heirloom, early productive variety

varieties.name: Karikachi (Karikachi No. 3)
varieties.traits: Traditional Japanese variety, proven performance

varieties.name: Tohya
varieties.traits: High quality variety, larger than standard

varieties.name: Soy Good
varieties.traits: Early maturing 70-75 days

varieties.name: Early Hakucho
varieties.traits: Early variety, compact plants

varieties.name: Edamame (Generic India)
varieties.traits: Summer-loving bush 1.5-2m, fuzzy white pods, green beans
varieties.yield_notes: Good productivity 75-90 days, used as cover crop for nitrogen fixation
varieties.availability: AllThatGrows (India), Indian seed suppliers, available fresh in BigBasket, Trikaya

varieties.name: Swarna Vasundhara  🌱  🌏 INDIGENOUS
varieties.origin: ICAR Research Complex for Eastern Region, Plandu, Ranchi, Jharkhand - Indian-bred variety
varieties.traits: Vegetable soybean type, large seeds, grey pubescence, bright green pod/seed coat, 75% 2-3 seeded pods
varieties.yield_notes: High nutritional value, 15q graded green pods per acre recorded (Maharashtra trials)
varieties.availability: ICAR-Plandu (50kg+ available for multiplication), Indian agricultural extension services

varieties.name: Karune  🌱  🌏 INDIGENOUS
varieties.origin: India - vegetable soybean variety for Indian conditions
varieties.traits: Vegetable-type soybean, adapted for tropical/subtropical India
varieties.availability: Indian agricultural research stations, seed suppliers

varieties.name: MACS 1407  🌱  🌏 INDIGENOUS
varieties.origin: MACS-Agharkar Research Institute (ARI), Pune + ICAR collaboration - Indian-developed variety
varieties.traits: Thick stem, 7cm pod insertion height (mechanical harvest suitable), pod shattering resistant, 43 days to 50% flowering, 104 days maturity
varieties.yield_notes: 39 quintals/ha (17% increase over best check), highly productive
varieties.availability: ICAR seed production chain, Indian agricultural departments

varieties.name: NRC 128  🌱  🌏 INDIGENOUS
varieties.origin: ICAR-Indian Institute of Soybean Research, Indore - Indian-bred waterlogging tolerant variety
varieties.traits: First waterlogging tolerant variety for northern plains and eastern India, derived from JS 97-52
varieties.yield_notes: Superior yield and waterlogging tolerance combined

varieties.name: JS 95-60  🌱  🌏 INDIGENOUS
varieties.origin: Indian soybean variety, widely grown central India
varieties.traits: Short duration variety, dominant cultivar in >90% of central India soybean area

varieties.name: JS 20-29  🌱  🌏 INDIGENOUS
varieties.origin: ICAR breeding program using JS 97-52 (waterlogging tolerant parent)
varieties.traits: Developed from waterlogging tolerant variety, yield-focused
varieties.yield_notes: Released for cultivation in Central Zone

varieties.name: JS 20-69  🌱  🌏 INDIGENOUS
varieties.traits: Developed for yield traits, waterlogging tolerance genes

varieties.name: JS 20-98  🌱  🌏 INDIGENOUS
varieties.traits: Yield-focused variety with improved characteristics

varieties.name: NRC 2 (Ahilya 1)  🌱  🌏 INDIGENOUS
varieties.origin: ICAR-National Research Centre for Soybean, Indore
varieties.traits: Selected for high seed longevity - important for tropical storage
varieties.yield_notes: Reliable variety with good storage characteristics
varieties.availability: ICAR-IISR Indore, breeder seed production system

varieties.name: NRC 12 (Ahilya 2)  🌱  🌏 INDIGENOUS
varieties.traits: Bred for seed longevity in tropical conditions

varieties.name: NRC 37 (Ahilya 4)  🌱  🌏 INDIGENOUS
varieties.traits: High seed longevity, improved characteristics
varieties.availability: ICAR breeder seed, widely distributed India

varieties.name: NRC 7 (Ahilya 3)  🌱  🌏 INDIGENOUS
varieties.traits: Part of high seed longevity series

varieties.name: JS 335  🌱  🌏 INDIGENOUS
varieties.traits: Well-established variety, proven performance, high seed longevity

varieties.name: JS 93-05  🌱  🌏 INDIGENOUS
varieties.traits: Selected for seed longevity and adaptability

varieties.name: AGS292 (KPS292)
varieties.origin: WorldVeg (World Vegetable Center Taiwan), selection from Japanese landrace Taisho Shiroge
varieties.traits: Most popular variety for tropical Asian production and export, proven tropical performance
varieties.yield_notes: Main variety for commercial production/export from China and Thailand for 15+ years
varieties.availability: WorldVeg network, tropical Asia seed suppliers, may be available through international/Indian importers

varieties.name: Ryokkho 75 (No. 75)
varieties.origin: Japanese variety, WorldVeg introduction to tropical Asia
varieties.traits: Adapted for tropical production through Thai/Taiwan selection

varieties.name: 75A
varieties.traits: Year-round production capability in tropics (except March-April)

varieties.name: Taisho Shiroge
varieties.traits: Parent of AGS292, traditional Japanese genetics
